title: AI Strategy & Operations Associate
company_context: AI-native 'Smart Financial Platform' replacing legacy ERPs — automated accounting, real-time reporting. Operating core for Lovable, Legora, KeyShot. Well-backed early team defining a new category.
momentum_flag: MODERATE — strong logos (Lovable/Legora as customers) and world-class backers, but no fresh raise tied to this posting and listing is ~9 weeks old
biggest_lever: 'Foundational hire... building foundational processes for the first time' across Finance, Legal/Compliance, People Ops, General Ops — a first-employee-style operator brief that matches Ryan's Minima FA breadth and fundraising-ops exposure.
biggest_risk: Two strikes: (1) recency — ~61 days old, may be filled or deprioritised; (2) location — London is only a SECONDARY location (Copenhagen primary), so London eligibility should be confirmed before investing effort. Also finance-ops leaning vs pure generalist.
apply_move: Confirm London eligibility first (message recruiter / check before applying). If confirmed, apply via Ashby leading with fundraising-ops + investor-update + budget-accountability evidence to address the finance-ops tilt.
availability_note: Re-verified LIVE via Ashby posting-api (light-inc) 2026-06-10; isListed=true, publishedAt unchanged 2026-04-09, 62 days. LONDON CONFIRMED still valid (location=Copenhagen primary, secondaryLocations=['London']). Aged posting; G 32->30. callback_op unchanged 63.
